summary: Iteration 37 - Global Search Feature testing. 17/17 backend tests PASS. All frontend search features verified: desktop search input, mobile toggle, autocomplete dropdown, SearchPage (results/empty/placeholder), navigation not broken.

issues: Minor UX flicker: SearchPage briefly shows 'Nic jsme nenašli pro: ...' before results load (because `hasResults` is false when `results=null` during loading). Loading spinner is visible but 'no results' text also appears simultaneously. Fix: add `|| loading` guard to prevent showing 'Nic jsme nenašli' while loading.

features_tested.backend_search_authenticated: PASS - GET /api/search requires auth, returns 401/403 without token
features_tested.backend_search_422_1char: PASS - Returns 422 for q shorter than 2 chars (min_length=2 validation)
features_tested.backend_search_echo_query: PASS - 'query' field echoes back the search term
features_tested.backend_search_totals_integers: PASS - totals are integer counts per type
features_tested.backend_search_limit_respected: PASS - Results do not exceed requested limit
features_tested.backend_search_no_mongo_id: PASS - MongoDB _id not exposed in results
features_tested.backend_search_nonexistent: PASS - Empty results (empty lists, totals=0) for nonexistent term
features_tested.backend_search_case_insensitive: PASS - Case-insensitive search (same totals for 'test' vs 'TEST')
features_tested.backend_search_default_limit: PASS - Default limit works without error
features_tested.frontend_desktop_search_input: PASS - data-testid='global-search-input' visible on desktop, hidden on mobile
features_tested.frontend_mobile_search_toggle: PASS - data-testid='mobile-search-toggle' visible on mobile, hidden on desktop
features_tested.frontend_mobile_search_bar: PASS - Mobile search bar opens when toggle clicked, submits to /search
features_tested.frontend_autocomplete_dropdown: PASS - data-testid='search-suggestions' appears after typing (debounced), shows grouped results
features_tested.frontend_search_placeholder: PASS - data-testid='search-placeholder' shown when no query
features_tested.frontend_search_empty_state: PASS - data-testid='search-empty' with 'Nic jsme nenašli' shown for nonexistent query
features_tested.frontend_search_grouped_results: PASS - All 5 sections visible (posts, users, specialists, services, articles) for q=test
features_tested.frontend_search_all_btn: PASS - 'Zobrazit všechny výsledky' button in autocomplete navigates to /search
features_tested.frontend_nav_user_menu: PASS - User dropdown menu opens with profile/admin/logout links
features_tested.frontend_nav_links: PASS - All nav links (support, specialists, legal, news) work correctly

action_items: MINOR: Fix SearchPage UX flicker - add `|| loading` check to prevent showing 'Nic jsme nenašli pro:' text while results are still loading. Change: `{!loading && results && !hasResults && ...}` empty state div is already guarded, but the subtitle text above is not. Fix the subtitle: `{hasResults ? ... : loading ? null : <>Nic jsme nenašli pro:...</>}`
critical_code_review_comments: SearchPage.js line 90: `catch {}` silently swallows all errors - no error state shown to user if API fails. Consider adding error state.

SearchPage.js line 123-129: The 'Nic jsme nenašli pro:' subtitle text renders when `results=null && loading=true` because `hasResults` is false. Should guard with `!loading` to prevent false negative flash.
Navigation.js line 74: `catch { setSuggestions(null); }` silently fails - acceptable for autocomplete but worth noting.
SearchPage.js useEffect dependency [searchParams] missing doSearch (though doSearch has empty deps so stable - no real bug).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Global search feature fully implemented and tested. Backend: GET /api/search with auth, min 2 chars, grouped results (posts/users/specialists/services/articles). Frontend: desktop search in nav, mobile toggle, autocomplete dropdown with debounce, SearchPage at /search with grouped results/empty/placeholder states. Only minor UX issue: SearchPage subtitle 'Nic jsme nenašli pro:' flashes during loading state.
